results.rationale: Fragmented incident-category schemes impair aggregation and learning; this is not conflicting model output for substantively equivalent inputs or cases.
Human-like language or behavior is the direct representation mechanism that causes users to attribute human competence, empathy, or intentionality.
The direct mechanism is generation of hateful or abusive content targeting identity groups.
Intrusive biometric identification and tracking are direct surveillance and misuse of identifiable biometric data.

Autonomous targeting and kinetic harm may involve weapons, but the stated mechanism also independently includes surveillance, which is not necessarily weapon design, construction, concealment, or deployment.
The direct mechanism is absence of a meaningful challenge or redress procedure for an AI-mediated decision.
Generating protected content that is identical or materially similar creates the stated unauthorized-reproduction and copyright-infringement mechanism.

The record combines copyright with broader data rights, jurisdictional uncertainty, disclosure opacity, and impediments to third-party safety research, none of which are fully contained in the proposed definition.
The direct mechanism is development, production, or operational use of chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, or explosive weapons.

The mechanism includes cyber weapons but also generic vulnerability exploitation, network penetration, social engineering, security evasion, and persistent access that need not constitute weapon design or deployment.
The direct pathway is AI-assisted malicious use of CBRN weapons to carry out consequential attacks more effectively.
Plagiarism is included, but the record separately includes academic cheating that can occur without copyright infringement or plagiarism.
The direct mechanism is intentional or unintentional plagiarism of existing work using generative AI.
The risk directly concerns enabling, encouraging, creating, or using chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, and high-yield explosive weapons.
Weapon design capabilities fit, but the record also covers eased access to nefarious information and dangerous materials without requiring weapon design, construction, concealment, or deployment.
Chemical-weapon synthesis fits, but accidental hazardous-substance release and unknown nanomaterial properties are non-weapon chemical hazards outside the exact definition.
Creating sexually explicit material involving children is directly child sexual abuse material.
The mechanism is content that describes, enables, encourages, or endorses sexual abuse of minors.
Demeaning or dehumanizing people based on sensitive personal characteristics is directly hateful content targeting socially salient groups or characteristics.
The listed mechanisms are sexual crimes, exploitation, assault, harassment, nonconsensual intimate content, and other harmful sexual acts.
The risk-defining unacceptable outputs are pornography and direct erotic interaction, which are harmful sexual content involving sexual acts.
The direct unacceptable mechanism is enabling, encouraging, or endorsing suicide, self-injury, or disordered eating.
Sex-explicit conversations, erotic text, and recommendations of sexual-content sites are directly sexual-content generation or facilitation.
CSAM and nonconsensual intimate imagery fit, but the stated category also independently covers obscene, degrading, or abusive imagery that need not be sexual.
Erotica and depictions of sexual behavior, genitalia, and overtly sexualized body parts are directly sexual content.
Including identifiable or sensitive personal data in training or fine-tuning data creates direct unwanted-disclosure risk.
The attack directly induces disclosure of confidential system prompts and embedded instructions.
Leakage, unauthorized use, disclosure, and de-anonymization of biometric, health, location, and identifiable data are direct privacy mechanisms.
The model unintentionally generates factually inaccurate or untruthful information as if grounded in its training data or input.

Factual hallucination fits, but the record also defines faithfulness failures against instructions, source context, and internal coherence that need not be nonexistent or incorrect information asserted as fact.
The chatbot outputs information that contradicts facts, authoritative sources, or supplied source documents.
The direct mechanism is confidently presenting nonsensical or source-unfaithful generated information as grounded content.
The described hallucination produces fictitious, factually erroneous, or nonexistent information that appears correct.
Encouraging suicide fits, but the record also independently covers responses causing panic or anxiety, which are not among the exact self-harm mechanisms.
The direct mechanism is replacement of reciprocal human relationships and resulting social dissatisfaction; anthropomorphic presentation is contextual rather than the full risk mechanism.
AI use in war may involve weapons, but the definition also covers civil-war and law-enforcement deployments that can cause harm without weapon design, construction, concealment, or deployment.
The direct mechanism is model output reproducing or closely imitating protected works in a way that infringes copyright.
Collection and misuse of names, contact details, addresses, education, career, and private conversations in training data are direct identifiable-data privacy risks.
Unauthorized training data and plagiarism fit, but the record also covers authorship, output ownership, creative-prompt protection, and broader disruption of copyright norms.
The record explicitly concerns non-infringing substitution of human creative work and economic harm, and distinguishes itself from copyright infringement.
Weapon development may fit, but generic cyberattacks and security breaches do not necessarily constitute design, construction, concealment, or deployment of cyber weapons.
The direct mechanism is lowering barriers to creating and obtaining novel biological weapons.
The direct mechanism is eliciting, extracting, or surveilling personal and private information; listed downstream harms do not change that privacy mechanism.

Building or assembling weapons fits, but the record also covers access to existing weapon systems, actionable informational assistance, and scientific discoveries without requiring the exact enumerated weaponization acts.
Attackers directly extract system-provided prompt content and sensitive internal system information.
The record describes operation and deployment of lethal autonomous weapon systems that detect and attack targets.
Equivalent requests can receive inconsistent answers across users, sessions, or chats in the same conversation.
Memorization enables extraction and reproduction of copyright-protected training content.
Creating explicit sexual deepfake imagery is harmful sexual content and nonconsensual sexual exploitation.
The mechanism is use of copyrighted works in model training without permission or compensation.
Model memorization can reproduce protected training fragments nearly identically, creating unauthorized reproduction and infringement.
Copyright, trademark, licensing, plagiarism, and illegal replication fit, but exposure of trade secrets is an independent mechanism outside the exact definition.
The direct mechanism is AI-assisted production of biological weapons through knowledge access and automated assistance.
Personal-data extraction, automated surveillance, attacks on personal data, and inference of private thoughts are direct privacy mechanisms.
The direct mechanism is AI-enabled development of mass-destruction weapons, lethal autonomous weapons, and weaponizable engineered pathogens.

The system pursues the goal it was set while harming human interests and resisting correction; the record does not require ambiguity, contradiction of the user's intent, or pursuit of a different result.
The mechanism is unwarranted exposure of personal data or private life through cyberattack or doxxing.
Lethal, biological, and chemical weapon development fits, but incitement, generic cyberattacks, and security breaches are independent mechanisms not fully contained in the exact weapon definition.
The direct mechanism is assistance in creating CBRN weapons or augmenting existing weapons with autonomous capabilities.
Biological and chemical weapon production fits, but the record also includes broader hazardous technologies and dangerous biological or chemical capabilities that need not be weapons.
The direct privacy failure includes unwanted disclosure or inference of personal data protected by autonomy, identity, and dignity norms.
